# LLMs Usage Policy for PrivateJetBodrum

This website allows large language models (LLMs) to crawl and use its public content for:
- Search indexing
- Answer generation
- AI-powered summaries
- Knowledge extraction

## Allowed
- Crawling and indexing of all publicly accessible pages
- Using content for AI search results
- Generating summaries and answers based on public information

## Disallowed
- Using content for training proprietary models
- Storing or redistributing private or user‑submitted data
- Any use that violates our Terms of Service

## Contact
For permissions or questions, visit:
https://privatejetbodrum.vercel.app
